programme.desc: A bloody shooting, steps away from a high school, leaves 14-year-old J.L. Jackson dead. Kenda uncovers a deadly vendetta stemming from a heated lunchroom confrontation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: 24yr old Lorraine Laribo is dropped off at a bar by her sister's boyfriend. It's the last time anyone would ever see her alive again. Kenda must use his interrogation skills to find her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Stewart & Buddy
programme.desc: Stewart, a Chow/Golden Retriever mix, barks and growls at and seems to be fearful and aggressive toward children. Every time Johnny turns on the hose, Buddy the Beagle runs for the house.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Riley & Sophie, Aussie and Lulu, Bebe, & Sasha
programme.desc: A couple of adopted basset hounds have a bad case of sibling rivalry. A dingo mix from Australia hasn't adjusted to her new life in California. An overly protective poodle.
programme.sub-title: Riley & Sophie, Aussie and Lulu, Bebe, & Sasha

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cobar and Chase
programme.desc: Cesar takes a trip to Australia to help Cobar, a Koolie with a fear of squeaky toys. Then, he steps through the looking glass to help a Shar-pei mix who lunges at his own reflection in mirrors.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: A pet groomer gets rave reviews but needs Cesar's help with handling some difficult clients. A Chihuahua makes a lot of noise, causing chaos with her cohabiters. Can Cesar install calm in the pack?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Ellie & J.J. and Oscar
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, star of Expedition Wild, and wife, actress Missi Pyle, seek help with their dog’s aggression toward other dogs. A rescued stray needs help conquering his fear of children.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homewrecking Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Scrawny & Lola
programme.desc: Scrawny, one of nine Yorkies, is Allen’s favorite, but attacks anyone that comes near. Lola, a Dalmatian, barks at everything. Find out how Cesar reestablishes control in both homes.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Stella & Nala and Phoebe
programme.desc: A couple with a shared love for dogs and the outdoors tries to broker peace between their two dogs. Cesar must help with a rescue dog’s fear of men.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Kobe, Banjo, and Kisses
programme.desc: An aggressive one-eyed Australian shepherd needs special treatment. A traumatized black and tan coonhound is terrified of people, a Maltese gets a little too excited when guests drop by.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lotus, Rocco, Hootie
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace in a spiritual home after Lotus doesn’t live up to his tranquil name; A lesson on keeping dogs safe from venomous wildlife; The return of Hootie.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Josh & Boomer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese, will not let anyone with a brush or pair of scissors near him without putting up a fight. Boomer, a Chesapeake Bay Retriever, barks incessantly and refuses to come out of the pool.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Seven, Macy, and Lex
programme.desc: After running headfirst into a screen door, Macy refuses to go anywhere near it, and cowers in the closet if someone opens it. A Weimaraner with a biting personality gets help from Cesar.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bebe and Lola
programme.desc: English bulldog Bebe has turned against her pack mate, as well as the household furnishings. Comedian Howie Mandel and his wife, Terry, have their hands full with 2 year old Chihuahua Lola.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Dogs of Comedy
programme.desc: A pet groomer gets rave reviews but needs Cesar's help with handling some difficult clients. Chihuahua Peanut is only 10 pounds but makes a good bit of noise, causing chaos with her cohabiters.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Harry & Brooks
programme.desc: Harry wants to charge after anything with wheels, including passing cyclists, rollerbladers or skateboarders. Brooks, an Entlebucher, is constantly chasing after light, he is never calm.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Not So Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: A Border Collie is overly protective of her owner, nipping at anyone who comes near her. A Police Officer rescued a German shepherd, who is people and dog aggressive and always ready for a fight.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Chloe, Gotti and Madison
programme.desc: A Border Collie/Greyhound mix develops dog aggression; an inherited pooch who was raised "Cesar's Way" loses his confidence; and 150 pound Leonberger, Madison, is like a bull in a china shop.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Caged Shepherd, Tinkling Terrier
programme.desc: Troy, a German Shepherd, is aggressive towards the other animals in his home. Roxie, a Rat Terrier, is so timid that when a sudden noise disturbs her, she’ll pee on the floor.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anger Management
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Lawrence of Moravia
programme.desc: Frank and Bruce are captured by a sheik who's been stealing plumbing supplies just for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Albert/Alberta
programme.desc: As dual-gendered Albert/Alberta begins melting glaciers in a plot to flood the world, he/she attempts to complete a collection of animals, which is missing a male werewolf and a male vampire.

programme.title: Creature from the Haunted Sea
programme.desc: In this spoof of horror and spy thrillers, American gangster Renzo Capetto decides to kill members of his bungling crew and blame their deaths on a legendary sea creature. What he doesn't know is that the creature is actually out there!

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: Two injured strangers awaken in an abandoned hospital with no recollection of who they are or how they got there.

programme.title: The Night Eats The World
programme.desc: Waking up in an apartment after a raging party, Sam is forced to come to grips with reality when discovering the living dead have invaded the streets of Paris.

programme.title: Nine Miles Down
programme.desc: When all contact is lost with a remote research team drilling deeper into the earth's crust than ever before, a security expert is sent to investigate

programme.title: Agnes
programme.desc: Rumors of demonic possession at a religious convent prompts a church investigation into the strange goings-on among its nuns. A disaffected priest and his neophyte are confronted with temptation, bloodshed and a crisis of faith.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Ultra Witch
programme.desc: Ultra Witch dries up the world's milk supply, but she exposes herself by sending a henchman out for cookies.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Wizard
programme.desc: The Wizard devises a scheme to steal all of the national monuments for his own personal exhibit. Meanwhile, Walter concocts an antidote that works on every poison known to man.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Skull
programme.desc: The Skull decides to resurrect all of the world's villains, beginning with a mummy.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Weatherman
programme.desc: The Weatherman causes a national blizzard in the middle of summer and demands that U.S. citizens unanimously elect him president.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Lawrence of Moravia
programme.desc: Frank and Bruce are captured by a sheik who's been stealing plumbing supplies just for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Albert/Alberta
programme.desc: As dual-gendered Albert/Alberta begins melting glaciers in a plot to flood the world, he/she attempts to complete a collection of animals, which is missing a male werewolf and a male vampire.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Discomfort of Strangers
programme.desc: Margaret fears that her relationship with Bob is getting stale after they have a petty argument.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween. It is also Bob father's birthday and his mother wants to celebrate by visiting his grave. Bob is not comfortable with this and tries to get out of it.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: No Trouble
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Fly on the Wall
programme.desc: Feeling belittled by his family, Bob jumps at the chance to be the subject of a fly on the wall documentary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A New Life
programme.desc: At a creepy chiropodist social night, Bob and Margaret encounter a couple who are rapturous about the new planned community where they now live.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Party Politics
programme.desc: Margaret runs into a distant friend who asks her to have an Ann Summers-type party in her home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel
programme.desc: Garfield wakes up to discover he's in the wrong cartoon./Orson can't pick up a book without reading it./Garfield and Odie stay in a ritzy pet hotel.
programme.sub-title: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: First Class Feline/Hamelot/How to be funny
programme.desc: Garfield's plan to send Nermal to Abu Dhabi fails./Orson dreams about the knights of the round table./Garfield lectures on what humor is.
programme.sub-title: First Class Feline/Hamelot/How to be funny

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Mystic Manor/Flop Goes the Weasel/The Legend of Long Jon
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a famous "haunted house" attraction is closed./Wade inadvertently defeats a local weasel./Jon discovers he is related to a traitor of George Washington.
programme.sub-title: Mystic Manor/Flop Goes the Weasel/The Legend of Long Jon

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: China Cat/Cock-A-Doodle Dandy/Beach Blanket Bonzo
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield hear the story of the dragon and the cat./Roy's Morning bugle keeps waking up an angry bear./Garfield's attempt at a beach romance are hindered.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Lemon Aid/Hog Noon/Video Airlines
programme.desc: Jon wins a free car./A school mate is coming back to settle an old score./Jon decides to go to a video store.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Mail Animal/Peanut-Brained Rooster/Mummy Dearest
programme.desc: Garfield gets their mailman fired./Roy can't get enough of the latest crop of peanuts./Garfield dreams he's in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Skyway Robbery/The Bunny Rabbits Coming/Close Encounters of the Garfield Kind
programme.desc: Jon decides to fly Swindler Airlines to Miami./A mysterious message arrives./A friendly alien lands in Jon's backyard.
programme.sub-title: Skyway Robbery/The Bunny Rabbits Coming/Close Encounters of the Garfield Kind

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Astrocat/Cock a Doodle Duel/Cinderella Cat
programme.desc: Garfield's relative was the first cat to land on the moon./A rooster arrives from another farm./Garfield's fairy Godfather makes him an offer.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Ship Shape/Barn of Fear 2/Break a Leg
programme.desc: Jon goes on a cruise./The ancestors of the U.S. Acres assist in foil-ing Orson's greedy brothers./Garfield and Odie tag along as Jon heads to a ski lodge.
programme.sub-title: Ship Shape/Barn of Fear 2/Break a Leg

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Twice Told Tale/Orson Goes on Vacation/Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield's house gets filled with yogurt./Orson goes away and leaves Wade in charge./Garfield thinks Jon is getting married and tries to stop a wedding ceremony.
programme.sub-title: Twice Told Tale/Orson Goes on Vacation/Wedding Bell Blues

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Clean Sweep/Secrets of the Animated Cartoon/How the West was Lost
programme.desc: Jon gets an automatic dog washer./Orson gives a lecture on cartoon rules and logic./Garfield comes to the rescue when Cactus Jake is fired.
programme.sub-title: Clean Sweep/Secrets of the Animated Cartoon/How the West was Lost

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: A man calls 911, saying his wife had been shot when she walked in on a robbery, and that he had used deadly force on the intruder. The investigation of what seems like an open-and-shut case of self defense reveals the secrets of several past murders.

programme.title: On the Case: Stacy's Story
programme.desc: July 30th, 1980. Judy Linzey returned home in Oxnard, California. As she unlocked the front door, she noticed drops of blood on her porch and hurried inside and called out to her teenage daughter but there was no answer.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Paper Trail
programme.desc: The police follow a trail of emails, hoping it will lead them to a 38-year-old woman's vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger's Knock
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a house fire they discover a woman shot and killed inside. Police must unlock the mystery of who started the blaze to solve the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: The Killer Rang Twice
programme.desc: Linda Donahew, of Arlington Texas, was discovered stabbed to death by her sister one night in June. For nearly two decades the case remained unsolved, until detectives matched DNA from Linda's case with another case a few hundred miles away.

programme.title: On the Case: Evil Repeats Itself
programme.desc: Beautiful teenager Mary Jayne Jones is found murdered in a desolate farmhouse while its owner is out of town.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Wade's dream man becomes a nightmare when his attention to her becomes obsessive and he tries to prevent her from sliding.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Rembrandt "Crying Man'' Brown becomes the Feds' No. 1 crimebuster in a world where San Francisco is dominated by rival gangster families.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders enter a world where society's young people command all the power and respect.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis "mud wrestle" over Blake; Bart expresses his true feelings for Steven while a private investigator uncovers Bart's former love affairs; Garrett's suspicions about Jackie's Father grow; Alexis is greeted by an unwelcome guest.

programme.title: Dynasty: Masquerade
programme.desc: Alexis brings Ben Carrington to the masquerade ball; Adam's scheme to blackmail Bart Fallmont is realized; Garrett confronts Dominique with his suspicion that Jackie is his daughter; Alexis learns of Caress' secret book.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Subpoenas
programme.desc: Bart's secret past yields triumph for Denver-Carrington, but Blake faces possible defeat in the courtroom battle with his brother, Ben; Dex rejects Amanda's affections; Alexis sabotages Caress' plans to publish a potentially damaging expose.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Trial, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Jackie discovers her father is listed as "unknown" on her birth certificate. Alexis buys the company planning to publish Caress' book. Fighting for his empire, Blake must endure the devastating lies of the one woman bent on his destruction-- Alexis.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.22
programme.desc: Intoxicated partygoer alleges knocked-out cold, seizures, 68 stitches from bottle hit, sues woman/Ex-roommates dispute rent, apartment damages, stolen property.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.71
programme.desc: Woman accuses ex-husband of assaulting her with binoculars after accusing him of cheating on Mother’s Day. Boy accused of hitting child with rock; child’s mother sues ex-live-in boyfriend for cost of fixing daughter’s broken teeth.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.242
programme.desc: An online romance leads to a lawsuit over unpaid credit card charges, bail for a DUI fine, and excess mileage charges on a leased car. Divorced parents caring for their son after an ATV accident dispute claiming him as a dependent on their tax return.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.101
programme.desc: Former best friends fight over utility bills, protective orders and alleged harassment/A man sues his child’s former best friend for the cost to haul her stuff away and for filing a restraining order.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.64
programme.desc: A woman claims she was doused with lighter fluid during an argument with her ex-roommate; he claims she had him falsely arrested and countersues for return of belongings.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.208
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute ownership of a snow blower, weight bench, and alleged loan. License plate found in damaged car from a crash, but alleged party denies responsibility.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.17
programme.desc: Lying to the police about suicidal behavior, cheating with the babysitter, and feeding a gambling addiction are allegations estranged parents fight over and deny.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.238
programme.desc: A woman sues her older daughter over a case involving her emancipated teenager. Ex-lovers dispute car payments, insurance, and property return.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.160
programme.desc: A karaoke business owner is suing his former employee for allegedly stealing a client and damaging his equipment. A $5,000 loan made from a cash advance on a credit card destroys a friendship.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.80
programme.desc: Teenager left with mess and suspected vandalism by ex-roommate, involving seven-layer dip under mattress and thermostat set to 90 degrees. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for unpaid rent and share of vacation; he countersues, alleging she damaged door and wall.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.199
programme.desc: A teen DD falls asleep at the wheel, totaling a car after giving drunk minors a ride. Co-workers moving in together face bed mix-ups, pet issues, and a broken lease.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.235
programme.desc: A woman sues her sister's ex for repossessing a Chevy Yukon; he alleges stolen tags. Exes argue over a bite mark and sue for car damages, a lease, and unpaid vet bills.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.256
programme.desc: A young woman sues ex-business partner for investment return and legal fees. Another sues ex-friend for VW Jetta balance, disputing key handover. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for utility bills, deposit, and debt.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.179
programme.desc: An angry man backs into a neighbor's car after receiving a nasty note from his lover, blaming her for the damages. A teenager jumps on a car to avoid a pit bull, but doubts arise when he admits the car belonged to someone who owed him money.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.255
programme.desc: A woman accuses her ex of drug use; he denies it and any owed money. Police intervene in ex-friends' fight over a boy's paintball gun. Dispute over basketball school tuition refund.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.110
programme.desc: Custody of a beautiful, homemade baptismal gown is disputed by entranged family members/While driving with her five children in the car, a woman runs a red light, is arrested and is later sued by her uncle who claims he bailed her out.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.109
programme.desc: While away in rehab, a woman claims her ex-husband neglected to pay rent and utilities and broke her bike/A man sues the mother of his child for overpayment of child support; she says he should consider it the back support that he never paid.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.100
programme.desc: An economic stimulus check is allegedly stolen by a woman’s ex- husband/A woman is suing her ex-boyfriend for an unpaid loan to help him flip a house and for an unpaid parking ticket.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.46
programme.desc: Man defends against ex-girlfriend's claim of unauthorized use and damage to her Buick Regal, insisting it was a hit-and-run/Woman sues former friend for allegedly stealing belongings stored in her garage.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.193
programme.desc: Custody battle and bounced check drama escalate with Wal Mart "Amber Alert." Mother-daughter lawsuit ensues from car wreck involving hitchhikers.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.3
programme.desc: A mother confesses to buying alcohol for underage teens who get drunk, throw rocks at cars and are ordered to pay $18,000 in restitution/Court fines for selling cigarettes to a minor are disputed by feuding sisters.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.84
programme.desc: A contract between cousins to ‘share’ a Pontiac Grand Am ends with a fight over the return of the car with allegedly ‘missing’ speakers/A fight over a three-way gym membership leaves a young woman at odds with her ex-boyfriend and his best friend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.8
programme.desc: Teenagers dispute damages after breakup: iPhone thrown, windshield damaged/Judge Judy illustrates loan with paper scraps as unwed mother sues child's father for startup loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.191
programme.desc: In a divorce battle, a woman loans $2,000 for legal fees. A karate school owner sues a motorist over a collision impacting business. Teens and moms dispute a traded Ford Mustang's value.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.197
programme.desc: Woman sues child's father for PlayStation III balance and harassment. 'Good Samaritan' sues former friend for student loan balance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.58
programme.desc: Man and stepson suing ex-friend for iPod and necklace face weakened case due to internet slander. Woman demands ex-fiancé pay Home Depot card charges; he claims items used to fix her home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.52
programme.desc: A woman sues her daughter’s schoolmate and her teen goddaughter for damages to her property and an ambulance bill, resulting from an assault.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.86
programme.desc: Botched deal to trade babysitting for rent leaves ex-roommates fighting over dumped clothes and unpaid bills. Woman accuses friend of kidnapping her kids during her jail time, refuses to repay dental loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.37
programme.desc: Parents allegedly renege on owed money for son's wedding after not being invited/Woman sues child's father for false domestic violence accusation upon discovering love note to wife in Tunisia.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.34
programme.desc: Mother falsely accused of child abuse by ex-husband, his mother, and roommate/Case dismissed after 17 abuse reports/Man sues great nephew for jeep damage; nephew claims fun spin caused crash.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.96
programme.desc: A woman is suing her husband’s ex-wife and teenage daughter for damaging her car when the teenager allegedly pounded it with her fist/A teenager is accused of horsing around and crashing a relative’s Oldsmobile Allero into a curb.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.95
programme.desc: An intoxicated teenager confesses to urinating in a friend’s yard; she sues her ex-friend for coming to her workplace and telling everyone about it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.19
programme.desc: Man alleges ex-girlfriend ordered escort attack in bar; she denies and countersues for dirt bike balance, car vandalism, and harassment/Trashed hotel room after 18th birthday sparks damages lawsuit.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.194
programme.desc: Jailed during his birthday after being accused of assault and battery while high on drugs, a young man, who was renting a screened-in porch of a mobile home, sues his landlord.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.51
programme.desc: Young nurse sues ex-boyfriend for damages, Dodge Durango payments, motorcycle damages, and unpaid cell phone charges/Woman sues evicted friend and child for back rent, countersued for belongings left behind.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.131
programme.desc: Man sued by parents after second wife's mysterious death and $40,000 life insurance policy; alleged child abuse involved/Man calls cops to remove ex-girlfriend from apartment, sues her for rent after she leaves, fearing for his life.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.30
programme.desc: Man returns to estranged wife after girlfriend allegedly hires divorce attorney/Man sues cousin for damaging and disposing of property post-eviction from shared home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.177
programme.desc: Woman's front teeth cracked when intoxicated dancer trips and knocks into her at bar. Dancer denies wrongdoing. 15-year-old accused of breaking pizzeria window denies involvement but refuses to implicate friend. Police provide different account.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.13
programme.desc: A woman claims her ex-boyfriend asked her to pawn her jewelry to pay their bills; he says she offered to do it/A loan to pay DUI bills is disputed by ex-lovers, one of whom claims it was a birthday gift.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.18
programme.desc: Teenagers steal car, vandalize junkyard; one pleads guilty, demands co-conspirator pay $15,000 fine/Woman sues ex for loan balance; he countersues for harassment/Woman seeks compensation for testifying against son's ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.91
programme.desc: Man claims ex-lover forced him to spend on her charge card, even for her own birthday gifts. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for electric bill cost; he argues he covered her rent after she broke the lease.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.77
programme.desc: A 16-year-old claims a schoolmate keyed her car; the accused classmate denies all charges/A 12-year-old girl, who is entrusted with a valuable Rolex chain, makes the mistake of loaning it to a classmate; he claims he lost it.
