programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: Nickelback / Limp Bizkit / Queens Of The Stone Age / Kasabian / Coldplay
programme.desc: Rockstar (Nickelback) / My Way (Limp Bizkit) / Go With The Flow (Queens Of The Stone Age) / Club Foot (Kasabian) / Paradise (Coldplay)
programme.sub-title: Nickelback / Limp Bizkit / Queens Of The Stone Age / Kasabian / Coldplay

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: The Killers / Biffy Clyro / Sum 41 / Fall Out Boy / Feeder / Incubus
programme.desc: When You Were Young (The Killers) / Living Is A Problem Because Everything Dies (Biffy Clyro) / Fat Lip (Sum 41) / Centuries (Fall Out Boy) / Buck Rogers (Feeder) / Wish you were here (Incubus)
programme.sub-title: The Killers / Biffy Clyro / Sum 41 / Fall Out Boy / Feeder / Incubus

programme.title: Rock Anthems of the Century: Royal Blood / Blink 182 / Panic! At The Disco / Kings Of Leon / Muse / My Chemical Romance
programme.desc: Little Monster (Royal Blood) / I Miss You (Blink 182) / The Ballad Of Mona Lisa (Panic! At The Disco) / Sex On Fire (Kings Of Leon) / Plug In Baby (Muse) / Teenagers (My Chemical Romance)
programme.sub-title: Royal Blood / Blink 182 / Panic! At The Disco / Kings Of Leon / Muse / My Chemical Romance

programme.title: Arthur: When Duty Calls – Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Ladonna finds out the Army is transferring her dad to Oregon, and the whole Compson family is moving again. Fern and the others can tell Ladonna is upset, but don’t know how to help. What can they do to make the transition easier?

programme.title: Arthur: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Treasure Hunt/The Return Of The King
programme.desc: When Buster digs up an ancient arrowhead, everyone else wants to hunt for buried treasures, too. And a field trip to the Medieval Fair pits Arthur's class against another led by Ratburn's super-tough mentor, Mr. Pryce-Jones.
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Treasure Hunt/The Return Of The King

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Rules/Meet Binky
programme.desc: Writing your own name in graffiti all over the school wouldn't be very smart, right? Binky says he didn't do it, so detectives Fern and Buster are on the case. Then, Binky is the newest, hottest, hippest pop music craze in Elwood City.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Snow Biz/Bugged
programme.desc: Winter hits Elwood City and Arthur sees dollar signs! His snow-shoveling business is booming--that is, until Buster decides to get in on the action. And, Brain can be a know-it-all, and sometimes he really bugs people.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Real Mr. Ratburn/Arthur's Spelling Trubble
programme.desc: It's the first day of third grade and Arthur's biggest fear has come true--his new teacher is the dreaded Mr. Ratburn. Then, it’s time for the all-school spellathon. Arthur is chosen to compete, and he finds facing Prunella and The Brain!
programme.sub-title: Arthur and The Real Mr. Ratburn/Arthur's Spelling Trubble

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Pet Business/D.W. The Copycat
programme.desc: How can Arthur prove to his parents that he's responsible enough to take care of his very own puppy? "Get a job," suggests D.W.!. Yet another personality change for D.W., who's decided that from now on, she'll be just like Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Baxter, Cat Saver/Play It Again, D.W.
programme.desc: A cat gets stuck in a tree and Buster Baxter saves the day! Risking life and limb! Next, the ridiculous Crazy Bus song is EVERYWHERE, but mostly it's in the Read's home, because D.W. has to play it 4000 times a day.
programme.sub-title: Buster Baxter, Cat Saver/Play It Again, D.W.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Library Card/Arthur's Big Hit
programme.desc: When D.W. discovers that she can get her own library card, she rejoices at the world of books waiting for her. And, is it ever okay to hit someone? Sometimes you just get so mad, you wanna....pow! Right??

programme.title: Arthur: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal
programme.desc: D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.
programme.sub-title: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.
programme.sub-title: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite

programme.title: Arthur: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: Carl has agreed to play the accordion for George's puppet show. But his routines are getting in the way of rehearsals. Buster enlists Binky's help to keep him from gorging on delicious Tuvaluna cookies. Will Buster's self-control crumble?
programme.sub-title: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's New Puppy/Arthur Bounces Back
programme.desc: Arthur's new puppy is exactly what he wanted. He's cute and wriggly, and he follows Arthur everywhere. But training a puppy is harder than Arthur thought. Then, a mere $10 stands between Arthur and the shoes he's been dreaming about.

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?
programme.sub-title: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog
programme.desc: The circus is in town and the whole family's excited—until Arthur gets CHICKEN POX! Will he recover in time? Then, Arthur's worst fears come true when poor, sick Pal has to sleep overnight at the vet's office. Could it be something he did?
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Faraway Friend/Arthur and The Square Dance
programme.desc: Arthur's in the midst of writing a great adventure story with Buster when he gets some very bad news--Buster is leaving town to go live with his Dad for a while. Then, does Francine have a crush on Arthur?
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Faraway Friend/Arthur and The Square Dance

programme.title: Arthur: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation
programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother
programme.desc: A new girl has arrived in town and no one knows anything about her. And judging by the strange things happening at her house no one wants to know. Then, it's great having a friend spend the weekend.
programme.sub-title: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother

programme.title: Arthur: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears
programme.desc: The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!
programme.sub-title: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears

programme.title: Arthur: MacFrensky/The Good The Bad and the Binky
programme.desc: Cheating comes in to play when Francine and Brain are locked in a stiff competition to win student of the month. Babysitter Binky introduces his charge to the world of pro-wrestling, but is he being a good role model?
programme.sub-title: MacFrensky/The Good The Bad and the Binky

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny
programme.desc: Is The Brain a snob? That seems to be the explanation for why he won't go to Waterworld with his friends. And, Arthur's a notorious joke-killer. But when he's scheduled to perform as a carnival clown, he learns how to make people laugh!
programme.sub-title: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny

programme.title: Arthur: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune
programme.desc: During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur: Flea to Be You and Me/Kiss and Tell
programme.desc: Pal is itching like crazy and the culprit is Pepe, an Italian circus flea. Then, Emily returns from her summer in Paris with the amazing news that she's been kissed .... by a boy! Now can D.W. find her own Prince Charming?
programme.sub-title: Flea to Be You and Me/Kiss and Tell

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Toy Trouble/Spar for the Course
programme.desc: It's a race to the toy store after Arthur realizes he may have given away his chance at 2 million dollars! Unless Muffy, Buster, and Binky can comprise, they'll be stuck with a boring windmill at the new 18th hole at the mini golf course.
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Toy Trouble/Spar for the Course

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Name Game/Finders Key-Pers
programme.desc: D.W. and Arthur get their feelings hurt when their efforts to insult each other get out of control. Next, Arthur, Brain, and Binky find a key--but to what? And which of them will get to keep whatever fabulous thing they find with it?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous
programme.desc: Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!
programme.sub-title: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous

programme.title: Arthur: Bully for Binky/Misfortune Teller
programme.desc: Is Binky Barnes really the most disgusting, nasty, horrible person on the planet, or is he just misunderstood? Next, what's got four sides and the answer to everything? Prunella's cootie catcher!

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The third episode opens with Rommel’s second offensive in North Africa.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The fourth episode sees the Germans well and truly on the retreat and the Allies are able to successfully implement operation Husky: the landing on Sicily.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: After a careful campaign of disinformation that throws the German defenders off-guard, the Western Allies finally land on Normandy.France is liberated.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: The Marines succeed in the "island hopping" strategy against suicidal resistance. The US Navy establishes supremacy, cutting off Japan.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Dunkirk (September 1, 1939)
programme.desc: To keep France free, 400,000 English soldiers have manned the battlefields. Germany's strength is too great and pushes the British to the coast town of Dunkirk.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of Poland
programme.desc: German tanks roll into Poland in September 1939.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Norway (Early 1940)
programme.desc: Early in the war, the Germans decide they need to guarantee access to the Norwegian port of Narvik to ensure their supplies of Swedish iron ore. The British, however, send destroyers to up-end the German plan.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Bombing of England (Fall 1940)
programme.desc: After invading France, Hitler is planning to cross the Channel. His only obstacle is the Royal Air Force. Throughout the summer of 1940, both sides lose an incredible number of daring flyers.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Tobruk
programme.desc: German field marshal Erwin Rommel scores a major victory at the Libyan seaport of Tobruk.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Operation Mercury
programme.desc: After British forces withdrew in defeat from Greece to the island of Crete in early 1941, they were soon fighting German invasion armies again. This time, 5,000 of Hitler's elite paratroopers landed to complete their conquest in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Malta (June 1941)
programme.desc: In 1941, Mussolini desperately wants to wrest the tiny island of Malta from the British for control of the Mediterranean. When his inadequate air force fails to bomb the Maltese into submission, Hitler's Luftwaffe joins the campaign.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Fall of Singapore (October 1941)
programme.desc: Before the sneak attack on Pearl Harbor, the Japanese initiate the Pacific War by firing on the British in Malaya. Their route to the rubber-rich nation takes them into Singapore, the World's most armed fortress.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Pearl Harbor (December 7, 1941)
programme.desc: During a two-hour surprise attack on the American Pacific fleet anchored at Pearl Harbor, Japanese navy pilots score a near-complete victory.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Midway (June 2, 1942)
programme.desc: Only one isolated atoll prevents an enemy invasion of Hawaii. Midway Island is where the Japanese fleet converges on a tiny American base with a massive strafing and bombing attack.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Solomon Islands (July 1942)
programme.desc: For the first time since Americans entered the war, Marines face Japanese infantrymen at Guadal Canal. In the jungles, two powerful armies clash in a six month battle that claims nearly 30,000 lives.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Dieppe
programme.desc: The Allies launch an ill-fated attack on the German-occupied port of Dieppe, France.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: German forces encounter Russian resistance.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: El Alamein
programme.desc: Erwin Rommel battles Allied forces in North Africa in 1942.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: North Africa (November 1942)
programme.desc: In the North African desert in 1942, American fighting forces encounter the dreaded Rommel for the first time to stop the German war machine.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Burma: The Forgotten Front (Spring 1943)
programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Monte Cassino (September 3, 1943)
programme.desc: As the allies make their way into Italy, they encounter tremendous resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line. One of these locations is an ancient monastery called Monte Cassino.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over 9 months ago. Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her. Will Nev and Max be able help Tyreme finally meet his Tomorrow? (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max embark on their biggest case as they track down the infamous Shelly Chartier to uncover truths about the celeb catfishing of Paris Roxanne and NBA star Chris Andersen. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Long Islander Catherine has fallen deeply in love with country boy Graham from Tennessee. She's ready to uproot her life to be a country girl with him, but Nev and Max uncover that Graham's not everything he claims to be.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Southern sweetheart Kelsie is madly in love with her online romeo, Brandon. But after years of endless excuses of why he cannot meet up, Kelsie recruits Nev and Max to go deep in the heart of Texas to find who Brandon really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Vince can't seem to escape his online-ex, Alyssa, whose stalking has caused his real life girlfriend, Liz, to break up with him. Nev and Max help Vince confront Alyssa so he can try to salvage a future with Liz.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually evaded meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Is Caroline an imposter or is she just afraid? (S2, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After three long years, Robin is desperate to finally meet her elusive, hunky, long-distance love in person. Nev and Max agree to help her hunt him down, but what they uncover turns out to be much more than Robin bargained for!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love is for real. Nev investigates to reveal a shocking Catfish.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tiana & James
programme.desc: After a three-year online relationship, Tiana moved across the country to be with the love of her life, James, and reveal her secret. But now James seems more elusive than ever.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jaylin is prepared to sacrifice a lifelong friendship and promising videogame career to be with a woman he's never even spoken to on the phone. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Thad & Sara
programme.desc: Thaddius sought refuge from his struggling marriage through an online relationship with Sara. When she starts telling tales of seizures and kidnappings, he starts to question her identity. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brendan loves McKenna, but failed attempts to connect have left him wondering if McKenna is for real. Nev teams with social media sensation Karrueche Tran to help Brendan uncover the truth. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Long Islander Catherine has fallen in love with Graham from Tennessee. She's ready to uproot her life to be with him, but Nev and Max discover that Graham's not everything he claims to be. (S5, ep18)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Robin is desperate to meet her hunky, long-distance love in person. Nev and Max agree to help her hunt him down, but what they uncover turns out to be much more than Robin bargained for! (S6, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Blaire & Markie
programme.desc: When Blaire's Instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on. But now Markie is back and wants to meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Markie's secret. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: The City: Unexpected Roommates
programme.desc: Adam kicks Jay out of his apartment so Allie can move in & Jay asks Whitney if he can live with her. Erin's plan to juggle two guys backfires & leaves her alone on New Year's Eve. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: The City: The Past Catches Up
programme.desc: When the gang goes to Miami for the weekend, Jay runs into his ex-girlfriend Danielle and Whitney wonders if the rumours about them might be true after all. (S1, ep10)

programme.title: The City: Fool Me Twice, Shame On Me
programme.desc: Whitney's crushed to learn that Jay's mysterious night out was spent with his ex-girlfriend, Danielle. Olivia steals the credit from Whitney when they style an ELLE cover shoot! (S1, ep11)
programme.sub-title: Fool Me Twice, Shame On Me

programme.title: The City: I'm Sorry Whit
programme.desc: When Jay finds out he's going on tour, Whitney isn't willing to give up on the relationship, but when Jay doesn't give her a choice their relationship ends in a tearful goodbye. (S1, ep12)

programme.title: The City: Finale
programme.desc: Fresh from a breakup with Jay, Whitney questions if she made the right decision leaving LA. An opportunity opens up at work, but Olivia is after the same position. (S1, ep13)

programme.title: The City: Sleeping With The Frenemy
programme.desc: Olivia's working at ELLE Magazine, but meets her match in co-worker Erin Kaplan. Whitney returns to work for Kelly Cutrone, & an old friend's in town, looking to crash with her. (S1, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed... until she meets a new guy. Denna meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, JWOWW's relationship with Tom comes to a dramatic end. Series 3, Episode 4.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie and JWOWW make up, leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family, and The Situation learns Deena's dirty little secret. Series 3, Episode 5.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects, Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged, and Pauly D makes peace with an old nemesis. Series 3, Episode 6.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Great Depression
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A Cheesy Situation
programme.desc: Sammi returns to the house & Ronnie is speechless. Snooki's feelings for Vinny continue to grow. Mike hooks up with a girl who he says smells like cheese, but is it just a prank? Series 3, Episode 10.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: GTF - Gym, Tan, Find Out Who Sammi Is Texting
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.
programme.sub-title: GTF - Gym, Tan, Find Out Who Sammi Is Texting

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A House Divided
programme.desc: Mike keeps instigating drama between Ron and Sammi, Snooki falls out with Vinny. Deena gets upset at Pauly and Vin for trying to hook up with her friend at the end-of-summer party.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 103
programme.desc: Peter's best friend, Victoria is going off to college and he MUST confess his feelings before she leaves. Christie, a hockey player with Olympic aspirations, must get out of the Friendzone with her best friend Dylan.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 104
programme.desc: Alex wants his best friend Anthony to be his first boyfriend. Dan puts years of friendship on the line to confess his feelings to Katie.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 105
programme.desc: Fitz hopes that confessing his love to his best friend Michelle will lead to love. Shelly thinks that her "clown" persona won't turn off her best friend as she asks him to be her boyfriend.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 106
programme.desc: Jaime has only known Steve for a year but the feelings she has for him make her want to be more than friends. Together Jackie and Frank have lost almost 200 pounds, newly fit Jackie now wants to make Frank her boyfriend.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 107
programme.desc: Jeremy plans a picnic to confess his deep affection for his best friend Amanda. Self-proclaimed ladies' man Nate thinks he's finally found a girl to make him quit his partying ways.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 108
programme.desc: Angelica attempts to steal her best friend John away from his current girlfriend. Shivani reveals her true feelings to BFF Parth.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 109
programme.desc: Katy wants to make her friend of 8 years, Brian, her boyfriend. Jackie reveals her heart to her best friend Ed right before his rock show.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 110
programme.desc: After going to the last two proms with Taylor as friends, Polly is ready to upgrade her relationship. Stephanie wants to retire her party girl image and ask Josh to be her boyfriend.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 111
programme.desc: Stephanie is tired of only fantasizing about Mike's "sexy face" and she's ready to make him her boyfriend. Sean and Kate were friends at first sight, now Sean wants to up the stakes.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 112
programme.desc: David tells his best friend Maia that he's been in love with her for 9 years. B-Hawk tries to prove to his friend Toni that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 113
programme.desc: Kris tries to woo his best friend Lauren with a special love song. Rachel musters the courage to tell Billy how she really feels.

programme.title: The Hills: You Always Miss a Best Friend / When Lauren's Away...
programme.desc: Heidi's sister Holly asks Lauren and Heidi to reconsider what happened to their friendship. Audrina and Justin's relationship is tested as she works a huge event for a record company. (S4, ep6)
programme.sub-title: You Always Miss a Best Friend / When Lauren's Away...

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Act Innocent / If She Never Met Spencer...
programme.desc: The truth comes out about Stephanie's relationship with Lauren's ex, Doug, when they all meet up for the first time at his pool party. Heidi's mother surprises her in LA. (S4, ep8)
programme.sub-title: Don't Act Innocent / If She Never Met Spencer...

programme.title: 48 Hours: Daddy's Little Girl
programme.desc: At 16 Mindy Berenyi, an Antwerp, Ohio girl claiming to be a victim of physical and psychological abuse, was tried for the murder of her father and, having agreed to a plea bargain, was sentenced to prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Mother Accused
programme.desc: This report investigates alleged incidents of Shaken Baby Syndrome, focusing on accusations involving Paulette and Kelly Welch, a Mormon couple living in Idaho Falls, Idaho, whose adopted son Stockton died on May 1, 1999 following a fall in their home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Family's Shame
programme.desc: The broadcast presents accounts of people who suffer the reality that a close relative has committed murder and endure the struggle between family ties and civic responsibility.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live To Tell: River's Edge
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A report on the March 1988 murder of legendary racecar driver Mickey Thompson and his wife Trudy. Thompson’s sister is convinced that Michael Goodwin, her brother’s former partner, was the killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 1
programme.desc: When a celebrity dog trainer is murdered, an heiress fears for her life and a bodyguard vows to be a hero.
programme.sub-title: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 1

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 2
programme.desc: When a celebrity dog trainer is murdered, an heiress fears for her life and a bodyguard vows to be a hero.
programme.sub-title: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 2

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Cop Behind Bars
programme.desc: Patrick Bradford, was convicted of stabbing his mistress to death. Determined to win his acquittal, Deborah Nolan, a close friend, and staunch supporter of Bradford’s, quit her teaching job and went to law school to take on his defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken: The Amber Dubois Story
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old girl breaks up with her abusive boyfriend, he snaps and breaks into her bedroom to attack her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance
programme.desc: Attorneys work to get a death row inmate who confessed to a crime he didn't commit out of prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghosts of Greenwich
programme.desc: A report on the murder of 15-year-old Martha Moxley in Greenwich, Connecticut and the new developments in Kennedy family member Michael Skakel’s efforts to overturn his 2002 murder conviction of Moxley.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The 2017 murder of famed hairstylist Fabio Sementilli who was found stabbed to death by his pool in Los Angeles. At first, police believed he was the victim of the “knock-knock” burglars, a ring targeting Hollywood celebrities.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Justice For Sheila?
programme.desc: This report offers fresh insight into the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, a Sarasota, Florida mother of quadruplets who was killed in front of her children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The investigation of the September 24, 1988 sexual torture-murder in Louisville, Kentucky, of Brenda Sue Schaefer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Psychiatrist and the Selfie
programme.desc: The case against Jacob Nolan, who claims his cousin and psychiatrist, Dr. Pamela Buchbinder, brainwashed him into attempting to kill her former lover, fellow psychiatrist Dr. Michael Weiss.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Expert Witness
programme.desc: This report focuses on the use of expert witnesses in criminal trials and the problems that arise when their testimony is inaccurate or completely false.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Justice
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ambushed
programme.desc: A man helps a new detective figure out who murdered his father.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Scared to Death
programme.desc: Police Lt. Jim Barton found his wife, Vickie, murdered execution-style on their farm in Warren County, Ohio, in 1995. With limited physical evidence and no suspects, the investigation lay dormant for nine years until a tip opened the case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Love, Hate & Obsession
programme.desc: In the investigation of the murder of a one-time millionaire, both his ex-wife and his son are suspects.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: The fraudulent international activities of Gerald and Catherine Hagar, professional fund raisers for charity, take the IMF to an estate on the French-Italian border.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 1
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF on an assignment to destroy the syndicate, a criminal empire headed by Frank Wayne.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues its fight against organized crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Emerald
programme.desc: The IMF is assigned to recover microfilm plans for manipulating international gold reserves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Counterfeiter
programme.desc: Destroying a drug ring is the task of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Town
programme.desc: IMF leader Jim Phelps is marked for murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killing
programme.desc: The IMF sets out to destroy a murder-for-hire organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Phoenix
programme.desc: The IMF foils the attempts of a once-powerful communist to regain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trial By Fury
programme.desc: The IMF goes to the aid of a friendly South American government which has been overthrown by revolutionaries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Recovery
programme.desc: The IMF takes the task of recovering a secret fail-safe device.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mercenaries
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
programme.desc: Barney's friends are playing a fun game of "I Can Do" where they each share something they can do. When BJ suggests having an "I Can Do" show, Baby Bop becomes worried.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Go For A Ride!
programme.desc: Barney and the children have fun playing with and learning about busses and cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Day and Night
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show
programme.sub-title: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's A Happy Day!
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an Art Show project that Melanie has made. A Park Kid named Myra has decided she doesn't like her name.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Seeing - Beethoven's Hear!
programme.desc: An ordinary game of "hide and seek" takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! Barney and Riff are happy to play along, but BJ thinks that his sister may be "seeing things."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Playing Games - No, No, No!
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules. In the end, Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing together, and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop decide to get Halloween celebrations underway with a costume party. When Ramon loses his trick-or-treat candy, BJ shares his treats with Ramon.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Good Egg
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Keep On Truckin'
programme.desc: Barney's friends Baby Bop and BJ learn about trucks as they wheel out their favorites and explore the functions and purposes of various trucks. BJ likes helping with his tow truck and Barney helps them see what it's like to be a real truck driver.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Got Served
programme.desc: After a crushing defeat, the guys leave an auction empty handed and scramble to find new merchandise at a yard sale. But questionable antique tennis rackets and an ancient special effects box may not earn them a cent.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Missouri Loves Company
programme.desc: On a visit to see Ton's sister in Missouri for some rafting and relaxation, the guys hit up a fast-paced live auction. After some tough losses, Ton and Allen score a ballista and an anvil set made for an explosive sport.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Catch My Drift?
programme.desc: The guys land a custom drift car and a luxury antiques unit that could have a one-of-a-kind pilot pistol from WWI. While trying to track down the provenance of the gun, Ton's lead foot gets them into trouble at their car sale.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game
programme.desc: Allen heads to an auction with Elle, while Ton and Big Sis revamp the shop to help bring in more customers. Allen unearths a Ouija board and a set of antique basketballs, and goes toe-to-toe with an NBA Hall of Famer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton
programme.desc: When Ton and Allen find themselves bidding against each other at an auction, the former partners battle it out in an epic showdown that leaves the fate of the pawnshop and their friendship in question.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the guys face a shady bidder with inside information and former NFL star Vince Papale in a battle for a vintage football passing machine and a colonial musket that could be worth huge money if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Chasing Christmas
programme.desc: A bitter and burned-out Ghost of Christmas Past decides to go AWOL.

programme.title: Megan's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: When Megan is taken away from the only life she’s ever known and moves to a small town in West Virginia, she struggles to fit in. She also gives up her one true passion, dancing. But the nativity at her local church might just turn her life around

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie stars David Hasselhoff as a sought after consultant hired by a workaholic mother (Caroline Rhea) in an effort to get her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: Christmas Mingle
programme.desc: A 30-something marketing executive with a top-notch career, killer wardrobe, dream apartment and great friends fills out a profile on a dating website hoping to find Mr. Right. However, her attempts at impressing her dream guy ends in disaster.

programme.title: The Christmas Sitters
programme.desc: Facing holiday flight delays, two parents double-book incompatible babysitters: the mother's lawyer friend, Nora, and the dad's half-brother, Max, to look after their kids. An attraction grows and it seems a Christmas miracle might be on the cards.

programme.title: A Screenshot to Santa
programme.desc: In this holiday family film, two sisters left home alone on December 23rd overcome their sibling rivalry as they stave off would-be intruders.

programme.title: I'll Be Next Door For Christmas
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Nicky’s long-distance boyfriend decides to visit for the holidays, she’s determined to spare him her family’s over-the-top Christmas obsession, by staging a fake Christmas dinner in the empty house next door...

programme.title: Guess Who’s Coming to Christmas Dinner?
programme.desc: Law student Maya brings her new boyfriend home for the holidays, neglecting to tell her family that he's - well - white. Maya has one week to persuade her family that this is true love, will she be able to pull off this Christmas miracle?

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: Christmas Harmony
programme.desc: Harmony's pop star boyfriend breaks up with her right before the holiday season, but when she returns to her hometown she discovers the heart and music that her life has been missing.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Bentley's birthday leads to a blowout between Maci and Ryan, Farrah spends time with Sophia before saying goodbye for a month and Amber and Gary come up with a custody plan for Leah. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Amber has second thoughts about giving Gary full custody, Catelynn helps Tyler cope with emotions about his dad and they both reflect on the adoption, and Farrah misses Sophia. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with Farrah, Maci, Catelynn and Amber from the final season of Teen Mom. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler sign Nova up for daycare while Maci throws a surprise birthday party for Taylor. Simon tries to get over Farrah while Amber and Matt settle on a wedding venue. (S6, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber celebrates Easter but is disappointed when another scandal comes out about Matt. Catelynn and Tyler find their dream home while Farrah makes an effort to get to know her mum's fiance. (S6, ep26)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber loses her cool with Ryan's wife. Maci wants Ryan to complete rehab. Catelynn worries about Tyler's dad since he's off parole. Farrah celebrates her birthday in New York. (S7, ep1)
programme.sub-title: Icing on a Cake of Lies

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber leans on her family while she figures out what to do about Matt, Ryan completes rehab early, Catelynn worries about postpartum depression, and Farrah looks for a home in Los Angeles. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah goes to Vegas for a girls' trip and her ex-boyfriend shows up. Catelynn and Tyler hurry to get everything ready for the launch of their children's clothing line. Amber kicks Matt out. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.desc: In the Belanglo State Forest, in November 2010, Matthew Milat kills a school friend in cold blood. In doing so, he satisfies his desire to follow in the footsteps of his notorious uncle, Ivan.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: Anu Singh informs her friends of a suicide pact made between her and Joe Cinque, her boyfriend, but only Joe winds up dead, with toxicology reports revealing high levels of Rohypnol and heroin in his system.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: An examination of how Martika Ferguson and Tiffiney Crawford were killed in the US, uncovering the impact of a desire for petty revenge and a murder disguised as suicide.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: In the US, four parents were shot by Antoine Suggs. In the UK, Alice Ruggles was stalked and murdered by ex-partner, raising issues around coercive control.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Adolf Hitler

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Josef Goebbels

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Hermann Goering

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Nazi Germany boasted that its locomotives were faster and more innovative. This programme examines that claim by looking at these ‘flying trains’.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians of the Thai-Burma railway tell the story of its construction. Built to supply Japan’s invasion of India, it cost thousands of lives – both POWs and Asian slave labourers.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Four railway journeys that changed modern history: 24-year-old Winston Churchill boarded an armoured train during the Boer War hoping for a newspaper scoop.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: In the 19th century, weapons became more sophisticated and more deadly, and the results were higher casualties with devastating wounds.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Twenty-four-year-old Winston Churchill boarded an armoured train during the Boer War hoping for a newspaper scoop. He was captured, but became world famous after escaping.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Historian Neil Faulkner tells the story of Lawrence of Arabia and his pioneering guerilla warfare against the railways of the Ottoman Empire.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: The story of the trench warfare from the First World War is well known. What is less well known is that the efficiency of the railway networks of both sides helped cause that stalemate.
