programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Goes To Prison
programme.desc: In an effort to make some fast money before March break, Gerry takes a side job teaching in a prison.

programme.title: Mr. D: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Gerry steps into the role of a lifetime and finds himself bitten by the acting bug and reveling in the newfound attention.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Throws The Game
programme.desc: Gerry takes on the senior girls’ volleyball team. But when he realizes their semifinals will be interfering with his all-important social schedule, he sets out to sabotage them at the quarterfinals.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Man With Two Red Shoes
programme.desc: When Gerry learns of a lurker near the school, he sets out to catch said lurker and earn the Teacher of the Month title.
programme.sub-title: The Man With Two Red Shoes

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Has Hot Sub Anxiety
programme.desc: Gerry is blown away by the hotness of the new substitute teachers and sets his sights on ‘hot-sub Mary,’ the new love of his life.

programme.title: Mr. D: Busplotation
programme.desc: When Gerry hears that a Kickstarter campaign raised a bundle of money for a bullied bus monitor, he sets out to victimize himself in a similar fashion. Meanwhile, Bobbi comes to a surprising realization and Dwyer has a ‘killer’ new girlfriend.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Charters A New Course
programme.desc: When Gerry isn’t given a full-time contract for next year, he makes a bold move that may change the course of his career.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants to Make Phys Ed Great Again
programme.desc: After finally achieving his goal of teaching physical education full time, Gerry sets out to teach the course the way it should be taught.
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants to Make Phys Ed Great Again

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Rigs PTA
programme.desc: Lisa runs for the unopposed Parent-Teacher Association president position as a way to punish the staff.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Cuts a Footloose
programme.desc: When Gerry meets a DJ at the gym, he offers her a job at the school dance, but Robert has banned dances and won't budge on his position.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Coaches Hockey
programme.desc: Gerry suspects Central High of cheating; Bobbi prepares for maternity leave.

programme.title: Mr. D: Formative Bullshit
programme.desc: Gerry discovers that teaching phys ed comes up a lot of paperwork; Bobbi tries to juggle work and a newborn; Lisa becomes friends with some moms who may have dirt on Xavier.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Pay to Play
programme.desc: Gerry is in a compromising situation after the teacher auction; Emma enlists Dwyer to do repairs in the library; Trudy gets a surprise visit.

programme.title: Mr. D: Work to Rule
programme.desc: Gerry is in awe of the concept of work-to-rule; Lisa tries setting boundaries with her stepson; Nisha accidentally reveals too much to her students.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants What He Can’t Trans
programme.desc: Gerry takes control of the girls' soccer team to get back at Coach Meyers; an ambitious mom seduces Frank; Lisa's reign of terror seemingly comes to an end.
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants What He Can’t Trans

programme.title: Mr. D: Principal for a Day
programme.desc: Gerry's least-favorite student becomes Principal for a Day; a harmless prank goes sour; Bobbi accidentally ruins a student's life.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Redemption
programme.desc: Siobhan falls while rock climbing. As the others search for her, she dreams that she is on trial for supporting the Taelons. Zo'or questions whether Sandoval's CVI imperative to serve the Taelons has broken down as others are experiencing.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Between Heaven and Hell
programme.desc: Dr. Belman's daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve. Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election, somebody who will stand up to the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Isabel
programme.desc: Maiya experiences dimensional phasing. Augur and Liam believe they need to bring Isabel and Maiya together to let the universe merge them. Jonathan Doors announces his presidential candidacy and meets with Zo'or.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An escaped Jiridian takes Lili hostage. Their shuttle is sucked on to a Kimera ship where they, with Liam, have to go through an obstacle course to get to the core to exit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Using Jiridian technology, scientists create a physical bio surrogates where a human consciousness can be transferred. When a surrogate escapes, they must find it before it uses its fighting and weapons knowledge.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Second Chances
programme.desc: A Taelon program offers a transformation into a younger, healthier version of oneself. Liam fears that something more dangerous is also happening. Lili is worried that Doors' run for the presidency is negatively affecting the resistance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Payback
programme.desc: A mysterious death by poisoning creates questions about the safety of portal technology. When a Taelon is killed in the same manner, the investigation leads to a very smart scientist that even the Resistance was scared to work with.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Paul Chandler plots an attack on the Taelon Embassy in DC with the ship he stole from Lili. He begs her to join him in beginning an all out war.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Volunteers
programme.desc: A group of Resistance capture a volunteer from a Taelon program for youth. Liam decides they may learn valuable information from her. They also decide to send in one of their own as a volunteer to see what the program is teaching.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Bliss
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called "bliss" via a Taelon device. They discover it is widespread. With an instantly strong addictive property, the addicts are dying within 48 hours. The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Highjacked
programme.desc: With a reporter on board, the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space. Liam is the prime suspect, causing an even bigger rift between Da'an and Zo'or. As the ship floats, lost in space, they must find the real culprit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Defector
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle. When Liam locates the survivor (a Taelon called Belleye), he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Heroes and Heartbreak
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project, but the others are worried about his involvement. When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet, the Earth is in danger.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of D.C. Liam recovers the probe, but he, Augur, and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crossfire
programme.desc: As the election draws near, Liam believes Zo'or is trying to have Jonathan Doors murdered. The Resistance worries that an attack is imminent at the final debate. Julia mobilizes a group to protect Doors against Liam's wishes.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crackdown
programme.desc: An unknown woman saves Augur and Liam from the raids on the Resistance. Lili sabotages the mother ship, but Zo'or stops its total destruction. Lili is reportedly dead. The investigation on the President's shooter continues.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Vanished
programme.desc: Some who were detained during the Resistance sweep have not reappeared after their release. Lili is taken to a lab run by Sandoval and implanted. Renee tries to help Liam find the missing people.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Emancipation
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control. It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing. The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A joint Doors International/Taelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory, but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Once and Future World
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America. Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Thicker than Blood
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augur's is hired by Da'an to get information about the Resistance, resulting in the death of many members. Meanwhile, Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus. They discover a town that Da'an helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA.

programme.title: The Lost World: Prodigal Father
programme.desc: The explorers find trouble when they help save and aid a man they believe is Veronica's long lost father on the run from Kartas, a bounty hunter.

programme.title: The Lost World: Birthright
programme.desc: Summerlee, Roxton, and Veronica must outrun a T-rex that's tracking them for dinner. Meanwhile Marguerite, Malone, and Challenger are manipulated by Ramses to help him take his place as pharaoh.

programme.title: The Lost World: Resurrection
programme.desc: Malone and Veronica must defend the treehouse from mercenaries. After being ambushed by Norse warriors, Roxton must take the life of another in order to rise from the dead and save Marguerite.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Chosen One
programme.desc: Roxton is determined to help the chosen one find his way back to the elders and save the star of hope. Veronica and the others worry when Malone begins spending time with a strange women.

programme.title: The Lost World: Prophecy
programme.desc: A fortune teller gives the explorers startling predictions that prove eerily accurate, with Malone receiving a grim fortune Meanwhile Challenger and Summerlee try and evade highly-evolved raptors.

programme.title: The Lost World: Barbarians at the Gate
programme.desc: The explorer's last hope of leaving the plateau is destroyed when Drakul and his men come after them and their hot air balloon. A war breaks out between Drakul and Tribune, now armed with gunpowder.

programme.title: The Lost World: All or Nothing
programme.desc: After watching Summerlee fall from a destroyed bridge, Marguerite and Veronica attempt to find him. Tribune rescues Roxton but expects payment in kind.

programme.title: The Lost World: Amazons
programme.desc: The men find themselves embraced by a tribe of Amazons and discover they are to be studs for the breeding ritual, but this purpose may come with a fatal end.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tourist Season
programme.desc: Challenger builds a windmill. But when his generator is struck by lightning, a portal is opened that ushers in a helicopter carrying a family of tourists from the year 2000.

programme.title: The Lost World: Stone Cold
programme.desc: An ominous castle draws three of the adventurers under its paranormal influence. Roxton, Marguerite, and Malone take on new personalities while the mansion entangles them in a love triangle.

programme.title: The Lost World: Divine Right
programme.desc: A riderless horse leads Roxton to a tribe that makes him king. He must either accept the title or face execution, while the rest of the group is captured.

programme.title: The Lost World: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Marguerite begins acting uncharacteristically nice, the group raises some questions. A stumbling dinosaur in the jungle holds the answer: an alien life force has begun controlling their bodies.

programme.title: The Lost World: London Calling
programme.desc: Nelson discovers a map that shows a way off the plateau, but he has doubts about leaving. The group has to outrun nomads as they follow the route out of the Lost Word.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Prisoner
programme.desc: A shape-shifter convinces Veronica that her parents are in a place called El Dorado. When Veronica takes off without telling the others, she unwittingly releases a powerful giant from captivity.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Games
programme.desc: Empress Centuria orders her Lizardmen to capture Tribune. When her soldiers find him at the treehouse, he, Malone, Marguerite, and Roxton are imprisoned, and thrown into the Gladiators' Arena.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Source
programme.desc: With all of Lost World thirsting for water, the explorers are attacked by raptors. They are aided by a young woman, Ana, and Marguerite becomes interested in her knowledge of the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: The Lost World: Trophies
programme.desc: A hunting party arrives on the plateau and takes fire at a Troglodyte child. Though they claim to be there to bring them home, Veronica becomes the target of their gunfire and snares.

programme.title: The Lost World: Voodoo Queen
programme.desc: An alluring stranger named Danielle seeks aide from Roxton and the others after her village is taken by Trogs. But when the woman uses a voodoo doll to bewitch Roxton, the group must rescue her.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Guardian
programme.desc: Challenger is trapped and taken to a village of orphans, protected by dense jungle and a plant that feeds on fresh meat. Marguerite and Veronica must help Challenger escape before they are killed.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Jon Culshaw and Debra Stephenson team up with experts Thomas Plant and Mark Stacey, hunting antique bargains in and around Edinburgh before auction in Essex. Who will win the day? Hopefully both teams, as all profits go to Children in Need.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Eastenders veterans Pam St Clement and Rudolph Walker team up with experts Charles Hanson and James Braxton. They seek out antiques from East Sussex, Tumbridge, Wells in Kent, and finish up--dramatically--at auction at Rayleigh in Essex.
programme.sub-title: Pam St. Clement and Rudolph Walker

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Goalkeepers Peter Shilton and Peter Schmeichel buy and sell antiques around Cheshire, aided by Paul Laidlaw and Mark Stacey. They visit a Cycling Museum in Warrington and a Football Museum in Manchester, ending up at auction in Runcorn.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Silent Witness stars Emilia Fox and Tom Ward, aided by experts James Braxton and Charlie Ross, embark on a hunt for antiques to turn a profit. From Glasgow to the Village of Kilbarchan, they end at auction in Billingshurst in West Sussex.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Masterchef's Gregg Wallace and John Torode feel the heat as they team up with experts Charles Hanson and Charlie Ross. They visit stately homes on their way from Alton in Hampshire to auction at Fernhurst on the Surrey/West Sussex border.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Sue Holderness and John Challis bargain hunt with Charles Hanson and Philip Serrell in Essex for auction in Kent. Can John outsmart his TV wife or will Sue win big? Hopefully, both teams will do well as all profits go to Children in Need.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Heavyweights Germaine Greer and Clive Anderson hit the shops of Lancashire with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson looking for antiques to auction in Northwich. With trips to Chetham Library and Helmsmore Mill Museum, who will win the day?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stage and screen stars Stefanie Powers and Don Warrington join Charles Hanson and Margie Cooper to make big profits buying and selling antiques. They go from Hertfordshire to auction in West Sussex, with magic and Mosquitos along the way.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Sheila Hancock takes on Sandi Toksvig around the Isle of Wight--Sheila's birthplace--visiting a globe-making firm and saucy postcard museum. Philip Serrell and David Barby lend a hand with buying and selling at auction in Tunbridge Wells.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists Bill Turnbull and Louise Minchin, more used to the BBC Breakfast couch than antiquing, compete with the help of Philip Serrell and David Barby. They begin in greater Manchester and end up at auction in Bridgenorth, Shropshire.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hansun and Thomas Plant help TV and radio legend David "Diddy" Hamilton and journalist Kate Silverton hunt for hidden treasure. Starting in Newark, they take in Ruddington, Nottingham and Derby, finishing in Chiswick, west London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Neil Stuke and Penny Smith hit the road with £400, shopping in Herefordshire with help from Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant and diversions to a cider museum and puppetry archive. At the auction in Newport, Shropshire, who will win the day?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Laila Rouass and Charles Dale battle their way around the north of England for eccentric antiques they hope will turn a profit. James Lewis and Paul Laidlaw are there to help as they travel from York via Leeds to auction in Chertsey.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: John Barrowman and Myleene Klass, with David Barby and David Harper, hunt for antiques to turn a profit. On the way, they visit Bristol, Chepstow, Newport and Cardiff before winding up at auction in Froncysylite by the Welsh-English border.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and David Barby help out former gold medalists Robin Cousins and Tessa Sanderson, ready to hit the road with £400. From Bury St Edmonds, with stops at the Whipple Museum and the Fan Museum, who will win the day in Greenwich?

programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his gruesome experiments. Starring: Peter Cushing, Francis Matthews, Eunice Gayson

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: Horror master Wes Craven directs this story about a family that moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club. Starring: Robert Urich, Joanna Cassidy, Susan Lucci

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois to kill again. Starring: Donald Pleasence, Jamie Lee Curtis, Tony Moran

programme.title: Blood Diner
programme.desc: The Namtut brothers run the most popular restaurant in town, but their meals contain the human byproducts of their attempts to resurrect the ancient goddess of blood and lust.

programme.title: Shivers
programme.desc: The residents of a suburban high-rise apartment building are being infected by a strain of parasites that turn them into mindless, sex-crazed fiends out to infect others by the slightest sexual contact.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Game Over

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Hunted
programme.desc: A greedy Hunter sets his sights in the deepest foliage of the Amazon Jungle recklessly trapping as many animals as he can, prepared to sell them to the highest bidders.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Chuck (and Melvin) and the Beanstalker
programme.desc: Questing through the dark, thick "dangerous" forest on a dire search for food, our starving brothers Chuck and Melvin come across an eerie Trading Post where they trade off Chuck's beloved horse Splendour for a bag of magic beans.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Transylvania Express

programme.title: Slumber Party Massacre II

programme.title: Re-Animator: Re-Animator

programme.title: One Dark Night
programme.desc: Karl Raymar, is mysteriously found dead in his home with the bodies of six dead women. Meanwhile, student Julie Wells is being initiated into an exclusive club where she must spend a night in the town's mausoleum. Where Karl has just been interred.

programme.title: Creature from the Haunted Sea
programme.desc: In this spoof of horror and spy thrillers, American gangster Renzo Capetto decides to kill members of his bungling crew and blame their deaths on a legendary sea creature. What he doesn't know is that the creature is actually out there!

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it.

programme.title: The Pack
programme.desc: A farmer and his family must fight for survival after a ferocious pack of wild dogs infiltrates their isolated farmhouse. Through a series of frightening and bloody encounters they are forced into survival mode to make it through the night.

programme.title: Dog Soldiers
programme.desc: A routine military exercise turns into a nightmare in the Scotland wilderness.

programme.title: An American Werewolf in Paris
programme.desc: An American man unwittingly gets involved with French werewolves who are able to transform at will.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: A bullied young boy befriends a young female vampire who lives in secrecy with her guardian. Starring: Kodi Smit-McPhee, Chloë Grace Moretz, Richard Jenkins

programme.title: The Ape Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist accidentally turns himself into a half ape, half human creature, and scrambles to find a cure.

programme.title: The Ape
programme.desc: Dr. Bernard Adrian is a kindly mad scientist who seeks to cure a young woman's polio. He needs spinal fluid from a human to complete the formula for his experimental serum.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: "Bloody Mary… " It was just a silly wishing game; one that Lindsey and her friends had played a thousand times in front of a dozen different mirrors.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Peter Newman wants a brand new mountain bike. That's the grand prize for winning the school's talent competition. Now all he needs is a talent.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: For Katie and Andy Lawrence, moving to a new town is painful enough. But when their parents take them on a boring sight-seeing tour, it's nothing but torture.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Everyone in Baskerville knows about Jimmy Leeds. In fact, Adam and his friends have been telling scary stories about Jimmy for years—stories they don't really believe.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Willy Tyler has the coolest train set-up ever. It takes up half of Willy’s attic and encompasses everything from medieval times to the Wild West.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: For Catan Thomas and his cousin, Lea, being trapped in Bumbleweed for a family reunion and their grandfather’s 70th birthday is painful enough.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: When Cody visits his grandparents at Shady Acres, he’s not expecting to find any excitement at all.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: It’s all Sammy’s fault. If only he and Nina hadn’t been out in those woods in the first place. If only they hadn’t seen that creepy old tree with the strange little door.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Deadtime Stories is an anthology series based on the goosebump-inducing book series of the same name by Annette and Gina Cascone.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E13 - Rhapsody In Blue
programme.desc: The crew finds a colony of Delvians. Z'han goes down to be with her own people for a while, but one of them wants something from Z'han.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E13 - Rhapsody In Blue

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E14 - Jeremiah Crichton
programme.desc: Crichton is left behind in Farscape One when Moya suddenly starbursts as a result of her pregnancy.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E15 - Durka Returns
programme.desc: When a Starburst goes badly wrong, Moya collides with a Nebari ship.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E16 - A Human Reaction
programme.desc: When Moya travels to an unstable wormhole that appears to lead to Earth, Crichton leaves on Farscape One in the hopes of returning home.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E16 - A Human Reaction

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E17 - Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Moya tries to starburst to prove to the crew that she still can. It goes slightly wrong though and she gets stuck in starburst.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E17 - Through The Looking Glass

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E18 - A Bug's Life
programme.desc: A peacekeeper ship is approaching Moya, so Crichton and Aeryn pose as peacekeeper officers on a secret mission.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E18 - A Bug's Life

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E19 - Nerve
programme.desc: Aeryn has been critically wounded. She needs some tissue samples to heal. The only source is the Secret base the Peacekeeper mentioned.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E20 - The Hidden Memory
programme.desc: Scorpius attempts to extract the wormhole technology from Crichton's mind, while Aeryn mounts a rescue operation.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E20 - The Hidden Memory

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E21 - Bone To Be Wild
programme.desc: The crew finds a planetoid that's a botanical paradise. Occupied by a scientist and a peaceful girl. But one is a killer.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E21 - Bone To Be Wild

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E22 - Family Ties
programme.desc: With death approaching in the form of Peacekeeper search parties, those aboard Moya say their final goodbyes, and share a last feast together.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby
programme.desc: Crichton, Aeryn and D'argo are stranded in an asteroid field while Scorpius searches for them. Their safety depends on Crais, who is nearby in Talyn.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E2 - Vitas Mortis
programme.desc: D'Argo takes part in a sacred ritual that helps an old Luxan, an Orican, to survive.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone
programme.desc: Chiana leaves Moya and goes to 'grave planet' populated by reckless thrill seekers who play dangerous and life-threatening games.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E4 - Crackers Don't Matter
programme.desc: A visitor comes on Moya with a device that could cloak Moya. The crew welcomes him on board, but soon almost everyone is acting paranoid.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E4 - Crackers Don't Matter

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E5 - The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: Chiana discovers a recording with Moya's original Pilot. After seeing the recording and realizing Aeryn was involved, Pilot orders Aeryn to leave Moya
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E5 - The Way We Weren't

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E6 - Picture If You Will
programme.desc: Chiana buys a picture in a store, which is more than it seems. The picture changes and shows Chiana what will happen to her.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E6 - Picture If You Will

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E7 - Home On The Remains
programme.desc: The crew needs food. Zhaan needs to eat meat and starts spewing spores. Only Aeryn seems to have a tolerance for the spores.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E7 - Home On The Remains

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E8 - Dream A Little Dream
programme.desc: While waiting for Moya to pick their Transport Pod, Zhaan tells Crichton of Moya's adventures after the Gammak base was destroyed.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E8 - Dream A Little Dream

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E9 - Out Of Their Minds
programme.desc: An alien ship fires a weapon at Moya. The blast makes it through and causes everyone's consciousness to jump into another body.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E9 - Out Of Their Minds

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc Adams saves a 12-year-old boy from hunger and exposure but cannot cure his desire for revenge.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Five gunmen individually hired to kill Marshal Matt Dillon converge on Dodge City.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A shaggy gold prospector boasts of striking it rich, then indulges in a spending spree, which he soon regrets.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young Indian named Kioga is relentless in stalking a fur trader for killing his father and robbing his family.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A reformed bounty hunter's lifelong dream for a ranch of his own leads him to accept one last job.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A man convicted in a gold mine swindle returns from prison to prove he is not a thief and coward.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A buffalo-bone hunter friend of Festus Haggen's poses as Marshal of Dodge City to fool his well-to-do brother from the East.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A rancher's son lets his older brother bear all the blame when they return home after serving a prison sentence for cattle rustling.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Four escaped convicts capture Marshal Matt Dillon and hold him hostage in their flight to the Mexican border.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A pretty young woman tries to leave an outlaw gang for a new life in Dodge City but is tricked into changing her mind.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A vengeful judge accuses Kitty and Festus of conspiracy in the killing of his son.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Kitty Russell inherits a gold mine from an old admirer and finds the margin between profit and trouble extremely narrow.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Collecting a $30,000 Mexican reward becomes a matter of life or death for two bounty hunters.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus Haggen is charged with the job of finding a wife for Sweet Billy, one of his kinfolk.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Fronted by a gun salesman, outlaws on a bank-robbing spree across the west head for Dodge City.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After robbing the bank, the outlaws kidnap Doc Adams and set fire to Dodge City to cover their getaway.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus runs away from Dodge City in shame after being bullied into killing a drunken sharpshooter traveling with a medicine show.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: One cheap revolver causes mayhem and murder. McGarrett doesn't underestimate the deadly threat of the cheap gun, for he knows that "Saturday Night Specials" are lethal whether pros or amateurs pull the trigger.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett joins forces with an air traffic conference investigator in an attempt to stop an airline ticket racket that not only bilks the carriers, but has also cost several lives.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O Chief Steve McGarrett's annual change of pace -- his active duty cruise with the naval re-serve — takes on a familiar feel when he draws orders to investigate the murder of a naval intelligence officer by a letter bomb.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O Chief Steve McGarrett's annual change of pace -- his active duty cruise with the naval re-serve — takes on a familiar feel when he draws orders to investigate the murder of a naval intelligence officer by a letter bomb.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O chief McGarrett wounded & at mercy of escaped convict Charlie Bombay. After capturing him, the plane crashes during a storm & pilot dies. McGarrett is crippled & Bombay takes control, using him as a hostage to evade justice.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O searches for missing Lord Charles Danby and unmasks a British intelligence agent Harry Wells in search of Danby. Wells' mission is to stop Danby from passing secrets to a communist, but McGarrett suspects Wells' identity & purpose.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: After Curt Anderson, a man with gambling connections, is found murdered in his Honolulu apartment, Steve McGarrett and his Five-O team hunt for a female courier for a Las Vegas casino and discover that a hit man is racing to beat them to her.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Someone somewhere in Hawaii is plotting to shoot down an airplane, utilizing a Russian-made surface-to-air missile (a SAM ). That much seems clear to Five-O chief Steve McGarrett. But who, where, and when and which plane?

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett was tried for murder by dangerous convicts led by enemy Honore Vashon after surrendering for hostages' release. Vashon, seeking revenge, intends to execute McGarrett, but McGarrett has doubt of Vashon's true motives.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett & hardboiled Dr. Ormsbee clash over top-secret research & defected physicist Chiang Lee seeking asylum in the US. McGarrett is unsure of Ormsbee & Chiang but starts to suspect Chiang of sinister motives.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett & Five-O protect singer Chelsea Merrimam from assassination by Hawaii kingpin Koko Apaleka, who seeks to eliminate her. McGarrett determined to save Chelsea & nail Apaleka.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Helen Hayes guest stars as Danny's visiting Aunt Clara. The murder of Clara's plane seatmate leads McGarrett to a small band of crooks stealing from abandoned bank accounts, money belonging to Hawaii.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Jack Cassidy guest stars as a smuggler targeted by McGarrett in the investigation of a large-scale smuggling op. McGarrett hunts for a submarine after discovering a murdered scuba diver in pursuit of a hefty cargo of narcotics.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Influential warehouse owner Mendoza criticizes police for warehouse burglaries, McGarrett & Five-O search for the gang. McGarrett was puzzled by loot not found on the illegal market & merchandise unsuitable for fencing.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett reopens 7yr old case of missing youth after crime writer calls out Five-O's incompetence. Evidence shows murder. McGarrett presses grandmother & Marshall on withheld info to uncover the killer's identity & motive.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Stabbed critically, a college football star is brought to a hospital by two other stars of the team, instigating a Five-O investigation involving the son of a well-known U.S. Senator and a cold-blooded cover-up of a gang rape.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O's McGarrett framed for possessing stolen art while investigating smuggling ring. Must clear name, find true culprit & solve case. Guest starring Edward Asner.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover as a homeless person to investigate the murder of a priest.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Pete Thornton agrees to take on the security of an old friend, political refugee Samantha Lora, but finds he can't do the job alone because of a worsening vision problem. He enlists MacGyver's help.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a mobster's search for stolen loot while nursing his injured leg at a country bed and breakfast run by two elderly sisters.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Murdoc is orderedto kill MacGyver in order to prove his loyalty to a professional hit squad.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a territorial dispute between an Indian reservation and an electric power company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Using their unorthodox methods, the Coltons combine their individual talents to create a team of world-class bounty hunters in this MacGyver spinoff.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton reminisce about past adventures as Pete prepares for eye surgery to treat his Glaucoma.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and the Phoenix Foundation are overseeing the security and protection of Delasora during his trial. MacGyver is obsessed with the death of Murdoc and believes that he's still alive.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's neighbor Kelly Dobbs overhears a plan to have accountant VictorNesbitt murdered. Victor is an accountant with one of Lyle Knox's holding companies and is planning on exposing the company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver picks up his best friend's father to take him to his grandson's Bar Mitzvah and finds himself inadvertently involved in an FBI/CIA mission.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After Prometheus, a crazed arsonist, is responsible for the death of his old friend, MacGyver sets out to solve the mystery of this madman and capture him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver faces the strange and frightening world of Voodoo, as he tries to save his politically active neighbor from a deranged, underground death squad.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A bump on the head takes MacGyver back to 7th century England where he searches for his roots and rescues a beautiful maiden from an evil queen.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A bump on the head takes MacGyver back to 7th century England where he searches for his roots and rescues a beautiful maiden from an evil queen.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A retired silent film comedian, Pinky, donates his films to the Phoenix Foundation and together, he and MacGyver, find themselves caught in a deadly trap woven by a special effects master named Neil who is out for revenge.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.desc: A beautiful woman who believes her husband has wronged her swears vengeance against all men.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A vicious old mountain, woman's back-country family hold Rowdy Yates for ransom when he tries to buy horses from them.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Jed Colby and the wife of a rebel leader are held as hostages in a Mexican border revolution.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Rowdy Yates and his drovers become involved in the local politics of a small town and a militant suffragette reform movement.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Escort to Doom

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A United States marshal arrests drover Jed Colby for an almost forgotten murder.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Clash at Broken Bluff

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Rowdy Yates' chances of getting a big herd across a treacherous river are hampered by an alcoholic guide.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Crossing at White Feather

programme.desc: The cattle drive, headed by trail boss Gil Favor and his chief assistant and "ramrod," Rowdy Yates, shares camp with a marshal and his deputy who are taking prisoners in for court trial via a tumbleweed wagon.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A water stop at a mission promises a delightful break in the hard work of driving cattle north until Rowdy Yates and his trail boss, Gil Favor, plus all the hands on the drive are invited to a wedding party.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trails boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates encounter a stage coach accident while driving their cattle north.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates find themselves involved in a brother's crusade for revenge after one of their trail hands suddenly leaves the cattle drive, as they pass through Barker Springs, and subsequently is shot to death.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Four sisters, headed by Hannah Haley are found huddled around their broken-down show wagon as trail boss Gil Favor and his ramrod drive their cattle north to market.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and his ramrod, Rowdy Yates, face the stalking terror of a life-devouring epidemic that strikes their cattle drive while they are on the open plains.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Town in Terror

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and his ramrod Rowdy Yates find themselves, their crew and their cattle drive the target of a vicious gang of bandits who make the plains their stalking ground.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A massive wind-swept plateau, one of the most difficult passes on the trip north, is the scene of the contest between Gil Favor and Jefferson Devereaux - boss of the country through which the drive is passing.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Jim's old girlfriend shows up hoping to rekindle their romance, Alex quickly sets out to win her heart away from her former suitor.
programme.sub-title: Alex Gets Burned By An Old Flame

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: On the eve of the biggest fight of his career, Tony loses interest in boxing when his girlfriend announces she may be expecting his baby.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.
programme.sub-title: Alex Tastes Death & Finds A Nice Restaurant

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angel Monica is excited at being promoted to the job of caseworker, a notch up from search and rescue missions, which finally gives her the chance to be seen by humans.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica takes a job as an assistant to a bitter high school baseball coach to help him come to terms with his impending death
programme.sub-title: Show Me The Way To Go Home

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is assigned to work with a woman who is considering suicide because a blackmailer threatens to reveal her past

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A pregnant teen must decide what to do.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: An accident occurs involving two women, Megan and Susana, who are dating the same man. The angels create a house on a deserted road, where the two friends, and Susana's husband, have Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help with a social event for a well-known doctor, his wife, and his mother. A young child shows up at their home, claiming to be the child they agreed to sponsor. The wife welcomes the child, but the doctor and his mother are worried.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess take jobs as party coordinators in order to help an orphaned boy and a wealthy family discover what's been missing in all of their lives

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica’s own faith is tested when she is assigned to live on the street to help a man who’s lost his wife, his home, and his self-esteem in a special one-hour episode

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica assumes the role of a freelance reporter to help a father realize the pressure he's putting on his son
programme.sub-title: There But For The Grace Of God

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess encounter racial violence, a neighbor who turns away from any involvement, and an angel with higher power that theirs, when they volunteer to help at an AIDS hospice

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica steps in when a caustic female radio show host uses personal information about her daughter’s social life to boost her on-air ratings

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica reveals her true identity to convince a skeptical magazine editor, Callie Martin (guest star Dinah Manoff), that angels really exist

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica goes to work as a television producer to help a driven young reporter after she leaves the scene of a hit-and-run accident

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica puts on a police uniform to save a cop whose drug habit will soon destroy him

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica's job in a strip joint leads to work as the baby sitter to a child with a terrible facial deformity

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess sign up for a poetry workshop to help Clarice Mitchell (guest star Maya Angelou) come to grips with the love her son feels for a young woman who has been diagnosed with AIDS

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is trapped with a bank owner and a pregnant teller inside a bank vault when a natural gas explosion thwarts a robbery in progress

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
